titleStmt.title: SII 9.352: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 352. (A.R. No. 116-A of 1913.) ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE AT NILAGUNDA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record, which is engraved in continuation of No. 340, registers the gift of the village Talavāgilahaḷḷi by the Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Bijjarasa-Achchutadēva. It is dated the cyclic year Kīlaka, Phālguṇa, śu. 13, Ādityavāra = probably A.D. 1309 February 25, Sunday, the only date for which the details work out correctly during the 13th and 14th centuries to which period the record may be assigned palaeographically.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kīlakasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa su 13 Ā śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
bijjarsa Accutadēvaṁgaḷu śrībhīmēśvaradēvara talavāgilahaḷḷiya taṁma ma
ṁneya kṣētrasā(ṁ)mya sahita 80 koṁḍu śrīhariharadēvara muṁde dāna
krayavāgi dhārāpūrvvaka māḍi koṭṭaru . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
